title: Stone Reinforged
description: A Forge (and soon to be Fabric) mod that adds a bunch of new Stone Blocks and Tools to the game.
body:
Introducing the "**Stone Reinforged**" mod for Minecraft,

a stylish expansion that introduces **smooth Calcite blocks, stairs, and slabs**, enhancing the visual appeal of your builds.

Craft a complete set of durable **Calcite tools** for both fashion and function. Additionally, elevate your mining experience with **new tool sets made from Diorite, Granite, Andesite, Sandstone, and Red Sandstone**, adding diversity to your resource-gathering endeavors.

Upgrade your world with the "**Stone Reinforged**" mod and redefine your Minecraft experience with sophistication and style.
